EVM.Settings.DefaultNavigation.Name: Default show in navigation
EVM.Settings.DefaultNavigation.Hint: Set whether newly created scenes are shown in navigation by default.

EVM.Settings.DefaultInitialY.Hint: Set the default initial view Y position for newly created scenes.
EVM.Settings.DefaultInitialZoom.Name: Default initial zoom
EVM.Settings.DefaultInitialZoom.Hint: Set the default initial zoom level for newly created scenes.
EVM.Settings.DefaultGridType.Name: Default grid type
EVM.Settings.DefaultGridType.Hint: Set the default grid type for newly created scenes.
EVM.Settings.DefaultWidth.Name: Default scene width
EVM.Settings.DefaultWidth.Hint: Set the default width for newly created scenes.
EVM.Settings.DefaultHeight.Name: Default scene height
EVM.Settings.DefaultHeight.Hint: Set the default height for newly created scenes.
EVM.Settings.DefaultPadding.Name: Default padding percentage
EVM.Settings.DefaultPadding.Hint: Set the default scene padding value for newly created scenes.
EVM.Settings.DefaultTokenVision.Name: Default token vision

EVM.Settings.WarnSceneDelete.Name: Warn when deleting a scene?
EVM.Settings.WarnSceneDelete.Hint: If disabled, deleting a scene skips the confirmation prompt and immediately deletes it.
